notes.ufli_level_bands: Approximate K/First/Second bands for UFLI units: 1-64, 65-96, 97-128. Refine in Codex if you want tighter placement.
notes.fundations_cumulative: Level 2 must inherit all Level 1 concepts.
notes.curriculum_cumulative_rule: Later levels inherit all earlier levels; within level, units are cumulative.
